name: Apple Strudel Puff Pastry
recipeIngredient: 2 large Cooking apples; peeled; and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw pastry for 20 minutes.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. On a lightly floured surface, roll the pastry into a rectangle measuring 12 x 15 inches.
4. Place the dough on an ungreased baking sheet and arrange the apples down the center.
5. Sprinkle the raisins and cinnamon-sugar mixture evenly over the apples.
6. Brush the edges of the dough with egg wash.
7. Roll up the pastry in a jelly roll style, ensuring the seam side is down.
8. Turn the ends under and brush with additional egg wash.
9. Make diagonal slits across the top at 2-inch intervals.
10. Bake for 35-40 minutes.
